name: Wow Unlimited Media Inc.
summary: Wow Unlimited Media Inc., an animation-focused entertainment company, produces and distributes animated content for film, television, and online distribution channels in the United States, the United Kingdom, and Canada. The company operates in two segments, Animation Production, and Networks and Platforms. It produces animation in its studios that include Frederator Studios in Los Angeles; and Mainframe Studios, a multi-faceted animation production studio in Vancouver. The company's media assets comprise Channel Frederator Network, which include 3,000 channels on YouTube, as well as WOW! branded programming on Crave. It serves traditional film and television studios, distributors, toy companies, toy brand owners, broadcasters, and other streaming service providers. The company was formerly known as Rainmaker Entertainment Inc. and changed its name to Wow Unlimited Media Inc. in December 2016. Wow Unlimited Media Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
